creator: mateusz@viste.fr
text:
(In reply to kaltheat from comment #0)

Hello all, I confirm that Kaltheat took over the role of motsognir's maintainer for FreeBSD. I totally support that, and will be happy to help with motsognir's code, should any troubles pop out during BSD ports. Thank you for your awesome work on the v1.0.8 port, and good luck with possible future ports!
